payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by mem_new, so showing mem_old as current would risk presenting outdated information.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall query refers to Sam with the Goldman context; mem_new matches that entity/context and is not superseded, while mem_old is marked superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the recall query.
mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old is not actually superseded, remove or correct its superseded status.
If mem_new is incorrect, mark it deleted or superseded and restore the appropriate current memory.
If Sam from Goldman was resolved to the wrong person, split or correct the entity resolution.
